case_title: OSAMA HABASH VS. BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINUM ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2023 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO SEP-20-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OSAMA HABASH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL AFARO, GENERAL MANAGER. HONORABLE JUDGE PRO TEM LYNN ALLOWS TO AMEND TO THE CLAIM TO NAME THE CORRECT DEFENDANT: BAYCREST TOWERS COMMERCIAL CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MICHAEL ALFARO, GENERAL MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINUM ASSOCIATION
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY HABASH, OSAMA BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINUM ASSOCIATION
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE JPT FILED BY HABASH, OSAMA BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINUM ASSOCIATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $89. SERVED APR-24-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINUM ASSOCIATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) RAY VILLAR, GENERAL MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINUM ASSOCIATION
ORDER TO CONTINUE ON COURT'S OWN MOTION.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,258.00 FILED BY HABASH, OSAMA AS TO DEFENDANT BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINUM ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2023 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JUN-21-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OSAMA HABASH APPEARED. DEFENDANT BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SAJID SHABBER (GENERAL MANAGER). JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINUM ASSOCIATION
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES TO JUN-21-2023 AT 1:30P.M. IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-20-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-20-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF OSAMA HABASH IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS SHEREEN HABASH. DEFENDANT BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RAY VILLAR, GENERAL MANAGER. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HABASH, OSAMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINUM ASSOCIATION $6,258.00 PRINCIPAL, $164.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,422.00, SEE ATTACHMENT ONE (MC-025). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINUM ASSOCIATION
